Crossref confirms journal-article type/container-title/authors, but peer-review integrity cannot be verified as genuine -- fails the peer_review_status:verified bar and cannot enter the accepted academic ledger regardless of DOI/Crossref presence.

Geography corrected to ET (Ethiopia) per confirmed author affiliations, replacing 'unconfirmed'. Retained as discovery_only per SOURCE_STANDARDS categories; does not count toward the 600-source academic quota.
